title: Daoist Canon: Qingjing Jing (Scripture of Purity and Stillness) (Section 1)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Qingjing Jing (Scripture of Purity and Stillness)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Qingjing Jing (Scripture of Purity and Stillness)

translation.text: From the Qingjing Jing (Scripture of Purity and Stillness) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
